nodes.context: New York street gang of the mid 19th century, known for brutal attacks and controlling the 18th Ward.
Group of handpicked plainclothes police officers formed by Captain George W. Walling to combat the Honeymoon Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: He formed a group of handpicked men, later known as the Strong Arm Squad.
edges.context: The Strong Arm Squad was formed specifically to attack and disband the Honeymoon Gang.
